questions.question: Describe the main difference between a partitional clustering algorithm and a density-based clustering algorithm. Provide an example of each. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the key difference between partitional and density-based clustering algorithms, and provide examples to illustrate your answer.

questions.question: What is the main advantage of using a grid-based approach for clustering? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Outline the benefits of using a grid-based approach for clustering.

questions.question: Explain the concept of 'k-means++' initialization algorithm and its purpose in partitional clustering. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the 'k-means++' initialization algorithm and its role in partitional clustering.
